name: Generate Junction Data
Build SQL
func:
const now = new Date();

const time =
    String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') + "." +
    String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0') + "." +
    String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');

// Save latest live state for dashboard and AI
flow.set(
    msg.payload.junction,
    {
        junction: msg.payload.junction,
        trafficCount: msg.payload.trafficCount,
        congestion: msg.payload.congestion,
        greenTime: msg.payload.greenTime,
        status: msg.payload.status,
        signal: msg.payload.signal,
        incident: msg.payload.incident,
        isEmergencyJunction: msg.payload.isEmergencyJunction
    }
);

// Build SQL for historical logging
msg.payload = `
INSERT INTO IUGRED_17.TRAFFIC_HISTORY
(
    JUNCTION_ID,
    TRAFFIC_COUNT,
    CONGESTION_LEVEL,
    SIGNAL_STATUS,
    GREEN_TIME,
    INCIDENT,
    EMERGENCY_MODE,
    RECORDED_AT
)
VALUES
(
    '${msg.payload.junction}',
    ${msg.payload.trafficCount},
    '${msg.payload.congestion}',
    '${msg.payload.signal}',
    ${msg.payload.greenTime},
    '${msg.payload.incident ? "YES" : "NO"}',
    '${msg.payload.isEmergencyJunction ? "YES" : "NO"}',
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
`;

return msg;

name: Update Junction State
func:
msg.payload = `
UPDATE IUGRED_17.TRAFFIC_JUNCTIONS
SET
    TRAFFIC_COUNT = ${msg.payload.trafficCount},
    CONGESTION_LEVEL = '${msg.payload.congestion}',
    SIGNAL_STATUS = '${msg.payload.signal}',
    GREEN_TIME = ${msg.payload.greenTime},
    INCIDENT = '${msg.payload.incident ? "YES" : "NO"}',
    EMERGENCY_MODE = '${msg.payload.isEmergencyJunction ? "YES" : "NO"}',
    LAST_UPDATED = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE JUNCTION_ID = '${msg.payload.junction}'
`;

return msg;

name: Average Congestion
Recent Events
func:
msg.payload = `
SELECT CREATED_AT AS EVENT_TIME,
       JUNCTION_ID,
       'INCIDENT' AS EVENT_TYPE
FROM IUGRED_17.INCIDENTS

UNION ALL

SELECT START_TIME AS EVENT_TIME,
       JUNCTION_ID,
       'EMERGENCY' AS EVENT_TYPE
FROM IUGRED_17.EMERGENCY_EVENTS

ORDER BY EVENT_TIME DESC
FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
`;

return msg;

func:

    JUNCTION_ID,
    VEHICLE_TYPE,

FROM IUGRED_17.EMERGENCY_EVENTS

`;

return msg;

func:
msg.topic = "🚨 Traffic Incident Alert"; msg.payload = `

Traffic Incident Detected

Location: ${msg.incidentJunctions}

Traffic volume has exceeded the safety threshold.

Immediate investigation is recommended.

Smart Traffic Management System

`; return msg;

name: Send Incident Cleared Email
func:
msg.topic = "✅ Traffic Incident Resolved"; msg.payload = `

Incident Resolved

All monitored junctions are now operating normally.

Traffic conditions have returned to safe levels.

Smart Traffic Management System

`; return msg;
